category_sources: source_facts.description identifies z80dasm as a disassembler for Z80 binary files.
display_name_sources: Homebrew formula id and source_facts.homepage use the project name z80dasm.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: Official project page references the upstream git repository at tablix.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Z80 binary disassembly functionality.
